phonetic: r忙藞pr蓲蕛m蓲虄; r忙藞pr蓹蕣蕛m蓲虄
phoneticUs: 藢r忙pro蕣蕛藞m蓱藧n藢藢r忙pr蓱藧蕛藞m蓱藧n
examples: There have been growing signs of a rapprochement with Vietnam.
There now seems little chance of rapprochement between the warring factions.
The next step of rapprochement came a generation later.
But a rapprochement between Chad and Sudan in 2010 has helped bring peace to that region.
But the rapprochement has been slow, fueling concerns that Turkey may be backsliding on its commitment.
